entries.reason: Independent visual audit found that the planned pinch action is not unmistakably executed.
entries.promptSuffix: Remediation requirement: show an unmistakable action moment with the documented enlarged chela visibly CLOSED, both claw tips contacting and compressing a harmless non-injurious object or a thick outer garment. Explicitly prohibit an open-claw display, near-contact, mere handling or posing, gore, or injury.

entries.reason: Independent visual audit found that the planned pinch action is not unmistakably executed. A second independent visual review rejected the first remediation result.
entries.promptSuffix: Second-review remediation requirement: compose the action as a close foreground side view of one enlarged chela fully SHUT around a separate thick folded fabric bundle, never a body part. The upper and lower pincer tips must visibly touch or overlap at the center of frame, with fabric squeezed flat at that exact contact point and bulging on both sides. Keep the closed contact point completely unobstructed and unmistakable. Do not show an open claw, any gap between tips, an arm or hand inside the claw, near-contact, draping, holding, resting, or posing. No gore or injury.
